# Architecture Constraints Packet：统一导出平台

本文件是统一导出平台进入计划和编码前的架构约束包。后续 `task.json` 中所有 `feature_impl` 任务必须复制本文件中的约束到 `architecture_constraints`，并把最容易跑偏的替代实现写入 `forbidden_implementations`。

## 1. System Shape

- 交付形态：`independent_microservice`。
- 运行方式：`http_service` + `worker` + `scheduled_job`。
- 部署单位：独立服务进程；后续实现必须提供生产启动入口和部署入口。
- 生产入口最低要求：HTTP server entry、scheduler worker entry、cleanup job entry、配置加载入口。
- 当前状态：仓库保留产品、契约、架构和测试文档；不保留任何已完成的业务实现、测试证据或旧运行 trace。

## 2. API Boundary

- 外部入口：HTTP，契约来源为 `contracts/openapi.yaml`。
- 子系统接入：仅通过 HTTP/Feign 调用统一导出平台，不加载业务 JAR，不直接写平台表。
- Public operation 完成条件：每个公开 operation 必须能追踪到 route/handler、service、repository 或外部 adapter、测试和证据路径。
- 禁止状态：只有 service class、领域函数或单元测试时，不得声明 API 需求完成。

## 3. Data Boundary

- 持久化：生产路径使用 MySQL 或等价关系型数据库；任务、注册配置、锁租约、批次检查点、文件元信息、审计日志都必须有 schema/migration。
- Repository 策略：生产 repository 必须走真实持久化边界；`InMemory*`、mock repository、fixture repository 只能用于单元测试。
- 数据访问：平台只允许访问注册配置声明的只读数据源或数据中台，禁止执行调用方传入的原始 SQL。
- 数据一致性：幂等键、配置快照、任务状态机、DB 锁租约和审计写入必须有可验证约束。

## 4. Async And Worker Boundary

- 调度方式：MySQL 轮询 + DB 抢锁。
- 锁模型：`lockOwner + lockExpireAt + leaseRenewedAt`，时间判断以数据库时间为准。
- 默认租约：5 分钟，worker 只能在批次边界续租。
- 接管规则：租约过期后的实例接管延续当前 `attemptNo`，从最近持久化批次检查点继续。
- 重试规则：只有 FAILED 重试递增 `attemptNo`；PENDING/EXECUTING 重试必须拒绝。

## 5. Test Double Policy

- `InMemory*` 允许范围：unit tests only。
- Mock 允许范围：外部依赖不可用时可作为临时单测替身，但不能作为验收证据。
- 生产完成证据：必须包含 API/handler 测试、DB repository 或 migration 验证、worker/lease 验证、`git diff --check`。
- 若真实 MySQL、对象存储或第三方依赖不可用，任务必须记录 `BLOCKED - 需要人工介入`，不得用内存实现冒充通过。

## 6. Forbidden Implementations

- 禁止把 `InMemory*`、mock、fixture repository 或领域原型作为生产实现完成。
- 禁止只有 `src/*/service.ts` 而没有 HTTP route/handler、server entry 和 API 集成测试。
- 禁止只有调度 class 而没有 worker entry、DB 锁 schema、repository 原子抢锁和租约测试。
- 禁止只有 OpenAPI 契约或文档而声明 `feature_impl` 完成。
- 禁止只运行 `git diff --check` 就声明 `feature_impl` 完成。
- 禁止把采购订单样板写成平台特例接口；样板必须复用标准 registry、query、file、audit 链路。

## 7. Architecture Fitness Checks

后续脚手架任务必须创建 `arch:check` 或等价命令。最低检查项：

- 生产 HTTP server entry 存在。
- scheduler worker entry 和 cleanup job entry 存在。
- `contracts/openapi.yaml` 的公开 operation 有 route/handler 和测试映射。
- 生产入口没有引用 `InMemory*`、mock repository 或测试 fixture。
- MySQL schema/migration 覆盖 task、registry、lease/checkpoint、file metadata、audit log。
- `feature_impl` 任务的 `test_command` 包含架构检查、affected tests 和 `git diff --check`。

## 8. Definition Of Done

- 当前任务的 `architecture_constraints` 已复制本文件相关条目。
- 当前任务的 `forbidden_implementations` 覆盖最容易跑偏的替代实现。
- Stage 1 Review 先审查架构形态，再审查业务规格。
- 完成声明能说明 production path、test double 和 BLOCKED 依赖边界。

| FR-003 | `downloadUrl`、`expiresAt`、`fileName`、`fileSize` 或等价 stream 元信息 | 用于证明下载保护和文件元信息可追踪 |
| FR-004 | `taskCode`、`status`、`createdBy`、`createdAtRange`、`fileFormat`、`subsystemCode` | 正式历史查询筛选维度 |
| FR-007 | `taskCode` 唯一、`enabled`、并发上限、保留期、单文件行数阈值、最大导出量、支持格式策略 | 注册配置必须能被查询和同步 |
| FR-008 | `datasourceCode`、`queryTemplateVersion`、`parameterSchemaDigest`、`fieldMappingDigest`、`maskingPolicyDigest`、`cursorField` | 用于证明集中查询模板、字段映射和脱敏策略可追溯 |
| FR-009 | `operatorId`、`tenantId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope`、`requestId`、`dataScopeExpression` | 统一认证上下文和数据范围约束最小字段 |
| FR-010 | `taskId`、`taskCode`、`subsystemCode`、`operatorId`、`action`、`result`、`errorCode`、`requestId`、发生时间 | 审计日志最小字段 |
| FR-012 | `attemptNo` 或等价执行尝试序号、内部取消标记、最终状态 | 用于证明重试不丢审计链路、取消不暴露内部状态 |
| FR-013 | `clientRequestId`、`idempotencyScope`、`requestDigest`、`configSnapshotDigest`、`attemptNo`、`lockOwner`、`lockExpireAt`、`leaseRenewedAt` | 用于证明幂等、防重复执行、配置快照和锁租约行为 |
| FR-006/FR-013 | `cursorField`、`lastCursor`、`processedCount`、`filePartNo`、`batchSize`、`batchRowCount`、`retryCount`、`backoffMs` | 用于证明游标分页、锁接管、批次执行和查询重试证据 |
| FR-014 | `taskCode=purchase-order-export`、`subsystemCode=purchase`、`datasourceCode`、`queryTemplateVersion`、`createdAtRange`、`orderStatus`、`supplierId`、`purchaseOrgId`、`keyword`、字段定义、敏感字段脱敏策略、`cursorField=orderId` | 用于证明采购订单样板集中查询合同可执行 |
| FR-008/FR-010/FR-013 | `taskId`、`attemptNo`、`requestId`、`queryTemplateVersion`、`datasourceCode`、`batchCheckpoint` | 用于证明查询执行上下文和审计串联 |
| FR-003/FR-011 | `tempStorageKey`、`publishedStorageKey`、`checksum`、`checksumVerifiedAt`、`publishedAt`、`deliveryReadyAt` | 用于证明临时对象、发布对象、校验和下载准备状态可追踪 |

## 4. 错误映射

| 场景 | 对外状态 | 错误码 | 验收入口 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 查询模板不存在或不合法 | `FAILED` | `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID` | AC-E011 |
| 数据源不可用或凭证不可用 | `FAILED` | `DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE` | AC-E012 |
| 查询执行失败 | `FAILED` | `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR` | AC-E013 |
| 查询批次重试耗尽 | `FAILED` | `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR` | AC-E020 |
| 查询模板或字段映射与任务快照冲突 | `FAILED` | `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID` 或 `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID` | AC-E024 |
| 字段映射不合法 | `FAILED` | `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID` | AC-E014 |
| 批次字段、顺序或脱敏结果不合法 | `FAILED` | `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID` 或 `MASKING_RULE_ERROR` | AC-E025 |
| 脱敏规则配置或执行失败 | `FAILED` | `MASKING_RULE_ERROR` | AC-E022 |
| 文件渲染失败 | `FAILED` | `EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR` | AC-E027 |
| OSS 上传失败 | `FAILED` | `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR` | AC-E005 |
| 文件发布前校验失败 | `FAILED` | `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR` | AC-E026 |
| 采购订单游标缺失、重复或非递增 | `FAILED` | `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR` | AC-E023 |

## 5. 缺口

| Gap ID | 缺口 | 处理方式 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GAP-001 | 样板模块字段与表头 | 采购订单导出样板覆盖订单号、订单状态、供应商、采购组织、采购员、创建时间、总金额、币种和脱敏后的联系人信息 |
| GAP-002 | 统一认证上下文字段 | 最小字段锁定为 `operatorId`、`tenantId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope`、`requestId`；联调只确认字段来源和透传方式 |
| GAP-003 | 查询性能基线 | 采购订单样板以 10 万行导出作为基线证据，记录总耗时、批大小、分片数和查询重试情况 |
| GAP-004 | OSS bucket/path、签名有效期和文件校验值生成方式 | bucket 由环境配置；path 默认 `exports/{subsystemCode}/{taskCode}/{yyyyMMdd}/{taskId}/{attemptNo}/{fileName}`；签名 URL 默认 10 分钟；校验默认 `SHA-256` |
| GAP-005 | 采购订单样板合同是否足够驱动实现和测试 | 已锁定 taskCode、subsystemCode、查询条件、字段顺序、敏感字段、游标字段、边界数据和压测证据 |

      responses:
        "200":
          description: Retry accepted.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskActionResponseEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InvalidTaskState"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/ActiveAttemptConflict"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotFound"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
  /export/registries:
    post:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Create export registry
      operationId: createExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryUpsertRequest"
            examples:
              purchaseOrderRegistry:
                value:
                  taskCode: purchase-order-export
                  subsystemCode: purchase
                  displayName: Purchase order export
                  enabled: true
                  concurrencyLimit: 3
                  fileRetentionDays: 15
                  taskHistoryRetentionDays: 30
                  singleFileMaxRows: 20000
                  exportMaxRows: 100000
                  supportedFormats: [XLSX, ZIP]
                  datasourceCode: purchase_ro
                  parameterSchema:
                    required: [createdAtFrom, createdAtTo]
                    properties:
                      createdAtFrom:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
                      createdAtTo:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
                      orderStatus:
                        type: string
                      supplierId:
                        type: string
                      purchaseOrgId:
                        type: string
                      keyword:
                        type: string
                  queryTemplate:
                    queryTemplateVersion: v1
                    templateText: "select ... where created_at between :createdAtFrom and :createdAtTo order by order_id asc"
                    allowedParameters: [createdAtFrom, createdAtTo, orderStatus, supplierId, purchaseOrgId, keyword]
                  fieldMappings:
                    - fieldCode: orderNo
                      headerName: Order No
                      fieldType: STRING
                      orderNo: 1
                      sensitive: false
                      exportable: true
                    - fieldCode: contactPhone
                      headerName: Contact Phone
                      fieldType: STRING
                      orderNo: 10
                      sensitive: true
                      exportable: true
                      maskingRuleCode: phone_mask
                  maskingPolicy:
                    rules:
                      phone_mask:
                        type: PHONE
                        preservePrefix: 3
                        preserveSuffix: 4
                  dataScopeTemplate: "tenant_id = :tenantId and org_id in (:orgScope)"
                  cursorField: orderId
                  orderBy:
                    - field: orderId
                      direction: ASC
                  batchSize: 1000
      x-contract-errorResponses:
        - QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
        - FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
        - MASKING_RULE_ERROR
        - REGISTRY_CONFLICT
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Registry created.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryBadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryConflict"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryServerError"
    get:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: List export registries
      operationId: listExportRegistries
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - name: taskCode
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: subsystemCode
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: enabled
          in: query
          schema:
            type: boolean
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            default: 1
        - name: pageSize
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            maximum: 100
            default: 20
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paged registry list.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryPageEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
  /export/registries/{taskCode}:
    get:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Get export registry
      operationId: getExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskCode"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Registry detail.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
    put:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Update export registry
      description: Registry updates only affect tasks created after the update.
      operationId: updateExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskCode"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryUpsertRequest"
      x-contract-errorResponses:
        - QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
        - FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
        - MASKING_RULE_ERROR
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Registry updated.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryBadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryServerError"
  /export/registries/{taskCode}/enable:
    post:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Enable export registry
      operationId: enableExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskCode"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Registry enabled.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
  /export/registries/{taskCode}/disable:
    post:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Disable export registry
      operationId: disableExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskCode"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Registry disabled.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
components:
  securitySchemes:
    OperatorId:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Operator-Id
      description: Authenticated operator id forwarded by gateway or caller.
    TenantId:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Tenant-Id
      description: Tenant id forwarded by gateway or caller.
    RoleCodes:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Role-Codes
      description: Comma-separated role codes forwarded by gateway or caller.
    OrgScope:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Org-Scope
      description: Organization scope forwarded by gateway or caller.
    RequestId:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Request-Id
      description: Request id used by audit logs and task events.
  parameters:
    XOperatorId:
      name: X-Operator-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Authenticated operator id.
    XTenantId:
      name: X-Tenant-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Tenant id for task visibility and data scope.
    XRoleCodes:
      name: X-Role-Codes
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Comma-separated role codes.
    XOrgScope:
      name: X-Org-Scope
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Organization scope expression or encoded scope list.
    XRequestId:
      name: X-Request-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Upstream request id used by audit logs and task events.
    TaskId:
      name: taskId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
    TaskCode:
      name: taskCode
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
  responses:
    AuthContextMissing:
      description: Required auth context is missing or malformed.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            authMissing:
              value:
                code: AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING
                message: auth context missing
                data: null
    PermissionDenied:
      description: Operator has no permission for the task, registry or file.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            denied:
              value:
                code: PERMISSION_DENIED
                message: permission denied
                data: null
    TaskNotFound:
      description: Task not found or invisible to current operator.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            notFound:
              value:
                code: TASK_NOT_FOUND
                message: task not found
                data: null
    TaskNotRegistered:
      description: taskCode is not registered.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            notRegistered:
              value:
                code: TASK_NOT_REGISTERED
                message: task code not registered
                data: null
    CreateTaskBadRequest:
      description: Create task request is invalid, disabled or exceeds configured limits.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            validation:
              value:
                code: VALIDATION_ERROR
                message: validation failed
                data: null
                errors:
                  - field: taskCode
                    reason: required
            taskDisabled:
              value:
                code: TASK_DISABLED
                message: task code is disabled
                data:
                  taskCode: purchase-order-export
            queryParamsTooLarge:
              value:
                code: QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE
                message: queryParams exceeds 32768 bytes
                data: null
            exportLimitExceeded:
              value:
                code: EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
                message: export limit exceeded
                data:
                  exportMaxRows: 100000
    IdempotencyConflict:
      description: Same idempotency scope with different request digest.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            conflict:
              value:
                code: IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
                message: clientRequestId conflicts with a different request digest
                data:
                  idempotencyScope: tenant-001:u001:purchase-order-export:req-20260513-0001
    InvalidTaskState:
      description: Operation is not allowed for current official task status.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            invalidRetry:
              value:
                code: INVALID_TASK_STATE
                message: current task status does not allow this operation
                data:
                  status: EXECUTING
    ActiveAttemptConflict:
      description: Another active execution attempt already exists.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            activeAttempt:
              value:
                code: ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT
                message: active execution attempt already exists
                data:
                  taskId: exp_20260513_000001
                  attemptNo: 1
    FileExpired:
      description: File is expired or marked as not downloadable.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            expired:
              value:
                code: FILE_EXPIRED
                message: file expired
                data: null
    FileNotReady:
      description: File is not published or the task is not completed yet.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            notReady:
              value:
                code: FILE_NOT_READY
                message: file is not ready for download
                data:
                  status: EXECUTING
    FileVerifyError:
      description: File upload, metadata or checksum verification failed before publish.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            verifyFailed:
              value:
                code: FILE_VERIFY_ERROR
                message: file verification failed
                data:
                  checksumAlgorithm: SHA-256
    DatasourceUnavailable:
      description: Datasource or datasource credential is unavailable.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            datasourceUnavailable:
              value:
                code: DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
                message: datasource unavailable
                data:
                  datasourceCode: purchase_ro
    QueryExecutionError:
      description: Query execution failed, batch retries exhausted or cursor contract violated.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            queryFailed:
              value:
                code: QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR
                message: query execution failed
                data:
                  cursorField: orderId
    RegistryBadRequest:
      description: Registry request is invalid, exceeds limits, or contains invalid field/masking configuration.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            validation:
              value:
                code: VALIDATION_ERROR
                message: validation failed
                data: null
            exportLimitExceeded:
              value:
                code: EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
                message: export limit exceeded
                data:
                  exportMaxRows: 100000
            fieldMappingInvalid:
              value:
                code: FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
                message: field mapping invalid
                data:
                  fieldCode: contactPhone
            maskingRuleError:
              value:
                code: MASKING_RULE_ERROR
                message: masking rule error
                data:
                  maskingRuleCode: phone_mask
    RegistryServerError:
      description: Registry contract references an invalid query template, datasource, field mapping or masking backend.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            queryTemplateInvalid:
              value:
                code: QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
                message: query template invalid
                data:
                  taskCode: purchase-order-export
            datasourceUnavailable:
              value:
                code: DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
                message: datasource unavailable
                data:
                  datasourceCode: purchase_ro
            fieldMappingInvalid:
              value:
                code: FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
                message: field mapping invalid
                data:
                  fieldCode: contactPhone
            maskingRuleError:
              value:
                code: MASKING_RULE_ERROR
                message: masking rule error
                data:
                  maskingRuleCode: phone_mask
    ExportRenderError:
      description: XLSX or ZIP render failed.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            renderFailed:
              value:
                code: EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR
                message: export render error
                data:
                  fileFormat: ZIP
    RegistryConflict:
      description: Registry taskCode already exists or conflicts with immutable fields.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            duplicate:
              value:
                code: REGISTRY_CONFLICT
                message: taskCode already exists
                data: null
    InternalError:
      description: Unclassified server-side error. Specific platform errors should use a more precise response when known.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            internalError:
              value:
                code: INTERNAL_ERROR
                message: internal error
                data: null
  schemas:
    ResponseCode:
      type: string
      enum:
        - SUCCESS
        - VALIDATION_ERROR
        - AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING
        - PERMISSION_DENIED
        - TASK_NOT_FOUND
        - TASK_NOT_REGISTERED
        - TASK_DISABLED
        - QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE
        - IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
        - INVALID_TASK_STATE
        - FILE_EXPIRED
        - FILE_NOT_READY
        - FILE_VERIFY_ERROR
        - QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
        - DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
        - QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR
        - FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
        - MASKING_RULE_ERROR
        - EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR
        - EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
        - REGISTRY_CONFLICT
        - ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
    TaskStatus:
      type: string
      description: Official public task status. Internal cancel flags are not valid values.
      enum: [PENDING, EXECUTING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELED, EXPIRED]
    FileFormat:
      type: string
      enum: [XLSX, ZIP]
    DeliveryMode:
      type: string
      enum: [SIGNED_URL, STREAM]
    Envelope:
      type: object
      required: [code, message]
      properties:
        code:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResponseCode"
        message:
          type: string
    ErrorEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          properties:
            data:
              type: object
              nullable: true
              additionalProperties: true
            errors:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FieldError"
    FieldError:
      type: object
      required: [field, reason]
      properties:
        field:
          type: string
        reason:
          type: string
    CreateExportTaskRequest:
      type: object
      required: [taskCode, subsystemCode, fileFormat, queryParams]
      properties:
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        fileFormat:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileFormat"
        clientRequestId:
          type: string
          maxLength: 128
          description: Optional idempotency key scoped by tenantId/operatorId/taskCode.
        queryParams:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
          description: Must match registry parameter schema and must not exceed 32768 bytes after canonical JSON serialization.
        deliveryPreference:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeliveryMode"
    CreateExportTaskResponseEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateExportTaskResponse"
    CreateExportTaskResponse:
      type: object
      required:
        - taskId
        - taskCode
        - subsystemCode
        - status
        - idempotencyScope
        - requestDigest
        - configSnapshotDigest
        - attemptNo
        - createdAt
      properties:
        taskId:
          type: string
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [PENDING]
        clientRequestId:
          type: string
        idempotencyHit:
          type: boolean
        idempotencyScope:
          type: string
          description: Stable success-response evidence for the tenantId + operatorId + taskCode + clientRequestId idempotency scope.
        requestDigest:
          type: string
        configSnapshotDigest:
          type: string
        attemptNo:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    ExportTaskDetailEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskDetail"
    ExportTaskDetail:
      type: object
      required:
        - taskId
        - taskCode
        - subsystemCode
        - status
        - totalCount
        - processedCount
        - progressPercent
        - attemptNo
        - requestId
        - requestDigest
        - configSnapshotDigest
        - createdBy
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt
      properties:
        taskId:
          type: string
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskStatus"
        totalCount:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          minimum: 0
        processedCount:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          minimum: 0
        progressPercent:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
        fileFormat:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileFormat"
        attemptNo:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        errorCode:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResponseCode"
        errorMessage:
          type: string
        failureStage:
          type: string
        lastSuccessStage:
          type: string
        requestId:
          type: string
        requestDigest:
          type: string
        configSnapshotDigest:
          type: string
        createdBy:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        file:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileMetadata"
        batchCheckpoint:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/BatchCheckpoint"
        recentEvents:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskEvent"
        auditEvents:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AuditEvent"
    ExportTaskPageEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskPage"
    ExportTaskPage:
      type: object
      required: [items, page, pageSize, total]
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskDetail"
        page:
          type: integer
        pageSize:
          type: integer
        total:
          type: integer
          format: int64
    DownloadResponseEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DownloadResponse"
    DownloadResponse:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileMetadata"
        - type: object
          required: [deliveryMode, expiresAt]
          properties:
            deliveryMode:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeliveryMode"
            downloadUrl:
              type: string
              format: uri
            expiresAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
    FileMetadata:
      type: object
      required:
        - fileName
        - fileSize
        - contentType
        - checksum
        - checksumAlgorithm
        - storageKey
        - expiresAt
        - attemptNo
      properties:
        fileName:
          type: string
        fileSize:
          type: integer
          format: int64
        contentType:
          type: string
        tempStorageKey:
          type: string
        publishedStorageKey:
          type: string
        storageKey:
          type: string
        expiresAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Published file retention expiry time. Signed URL responses also use expiresAt for URL expiry.
        checksum:
          type: string
        checksumAlgorithm:
          type: string
          enum: [SHA-256]
        checksumVerifiedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        publishedAt:

1. `openapi.yaml` 只放对外 API 的正式入口和状态/错误码锚点。
2. 分区目录里的契约文件按能力拆分，不把所有场景塞进单个大文件。
3. 每个契约必须能回指到至少一个 Requirement ID 和一个验收入口。
4. API 契约、scheduler 契约、query 契约、file 契约、audit 契约和 sample 契约必须保持同一组术语，尤其是 `attemptNo`、`configSnapshotDigest`、`batchCheckpoint`、`storageKey`、`requestId`。
5. 文件发布契约必须明确临时对象和已发布对象的边界，避免下载接口误暴露未发布对象。
6. query 契约必须明确禁止原始 SQL，只允许参数化模板和参数 schema 绑定。
7. scheduler 契约必须明确数据库时间、锁租约和接管规则，不允许依赖本机时间。

1. 先补 `contracts/openapi.yaml`，锚定对外 API。
